items.title: Selena Gomez Reacts to U.S. Figure Skater Alysa Liu Wearing Rare Beauty Lip Gloss at the 2026 Olympics
items.description: In a viral clip, the athlete is seen reaching for a Rare Beauty lip product on her way to accept her gold medal

items.title: Kelly Clarkson Shares the 'Really Hard' Part of Ending Her Talk Show That 'Sucked'
items.description: Clarkson announced earlier this month that she was ending 'The Kelly Clarkson Show' after seven seasons in order to 'prioritize' her kids

items.title: Princess Eugenie Spotted at Ski Resort in Switzerland Ahead of Ex-Prince Andrew's Arrest: Report
items.description: "Eugenie and Jack were with the children, the nanny and a group of friends," an onlooker told 'Hello!'

items.title: Why Rachael Ray Wanted Brooklyn Beckham to Co-Host Her Long-Running Event: ‘He's No Slouch in a Kitchen’ (Exclusive)
items.description: Beckham was representing his hot sauce brand, Cloud23, at Mike’s Amazing Burger Bash during the South Beach Wine & Food Festival
